endpoints.name: POST /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/clear
endpoints.description: Clears all completed tasks from the specified task list. The affected tasks will be marked as 'hidden' and no longer be returned by default when retrieving all tasks for a task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: GET /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks
endpoints.description: Returns all tasks in the specified task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: POST /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks
endpoints.description: Creates a new task on the specified task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: GET /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks/{task}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist. Replace {{TASK}} with a real task.

endpoints.name: PUT /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks/{task}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist. Replace {{TASK}} with a real task.

endpoints.name: DELETE /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks/{task}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified task from the task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist. Replace {{TASK}} with a real task.

endpoints.name: PATCH /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks/{task}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified task. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist. Replace {{TASK}} with a real task.

endpoints.name: POST /tasks/v1/lists/{tasklist}/tasks/{task}/move
endpoints.description: Moves the specified task to another position in the task list. This can include putting it as a child task under a new parent and/or move it to a different position among its sibling tasks.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist. Replace {{TASK}} with a real task.

endpoints.name: GET /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists
endpoints.description: Returns all the authenticated user's task lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists
endpoints.description: Creates a new task list and adds it to the authenticated user's task lists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists/{tasklist}
endpoints.description: Returns the authenticated user's specified task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: PUT /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists/{tasklist}
endpoints.description: Updates the authenticated user's specified task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: DELETE /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists/{tasklist}
endpoints.description: Deletes the authenticated user's specified task list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.

endpoints.name: PATCH /tasks/v1/users/@me/lists/{tasklist}
endpoints.description: Updates the authenticated user's specified task list. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TASKLIST}} with a real tasklist.
